title: Street Work Team Reaches Hundreds of Children in 2024
summary: UCDP's outreach team continued its street work across Kisumu, connecting with street children and linking them to support services.
content:
UCDP's Mobile Youth Work and Street Work team continued its vital outreach across Kisumu in 2024, making contact with hundreds of street children and vulnerable young people.

## What Street Work Involves

Trained outreach workers visit streets, markets, and gathering points across the city to build trusting relationships with street children. They provide food, basic medical care, and emotional support, and work to link children with UCDP's other programmes.

For many children, street work is the first step on a journey back to education, family, or stable housing.

*Update this article with 2024 outreach statistics and case stories.*
